provenance.name: What should be produced and when?
Which quality or schedule exception needs action?
What is the actual production cost and yield?
Manufacturing Routings and work centers API
Manufacturing Yield, scrap, downtime, and cost API
Read Yield, scrap, downtime, and cost
Manage Yield, scrap, downtime, and cost
Yield, scrap, downtime, and cost Workspace
Manufacturing: Demand and capacity forecast Prompt

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Released orders reference approved BOM and routing versions.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Material consumption and output create inventory movements.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Produced quantity, scrap, rework, and yield reconcile.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Quality holds prevent unauthorized use or shipment.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Capacity scheduling respects calendar, efficiency, and committed load.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Closed production orders are corrected through controlled adjustments.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Actual cost reconciles material, labor, overhead, scrap, and variance.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: AI schedules and forecasts require human approval before release.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
